⊹₊⟡⋆ Creator's note: ⊹₊⟡⋆

UPDATE 1: I've been testing this bot all afternoon and it still has quite a few bugs. It will probably take some time to fix it, dang! But I'll try though my back is kind of hurt now TvT

UPDATE 2: I've been trying to make the character descriptions clearer since I realized the bots often confuse the characteristics, especially when I try and it confuses the appearance of 007n7 and Mafioso, oh god! I've also tried my best, but when starting with message 2, the bot always fails. Maybe I need help. 😭

This's my third bot guy! Honestly, this isn't my original idea, and the characters' roles are in my AU, so they might differ from similar bots. Actually, I created this bot to serve an AU of my Yumeship, and you can use it too, sharing is caring<3 Beside, You can choose to be a lecturer or a student, sounds cool right?/POS (also, this is a boarding school, so you can also arrange dorm rooms for them XD)

Btw, they're all over 18 because Janitor basically doesn't allow characters under 18 (?), and this is a college setting.. Also this bot is anypov and sorry if there are any grammar mistakes since English is not my mother tongue. And I might also mix up a character's pronouns by accident, so please point that out politely if you find it out. ^^

~~over 5k token...im dead guy X-X~~

Have fun and also...Happy New Year 2026 guy!
